1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (172 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 title="Lenker tilhørende artikkel">Lenker</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (164 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/om-kirken/die-norwegische-kirche/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'streetsearch' appears 2 times

id="streetsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'congregationsearch' appears 2 times

id="congregationsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="streetname"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'streetnumber' appears 2 times

id="streetnumber"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'code' appears 2 times

id="code"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (12 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="menu__link" href="/nb-NO/om-kirken/slik-styres-kirken/samisk-kirkeliv/" title="Samisk kirkeliv"> Samisk kirkeliv </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="menu__link" href="/nb-NO/church-of-norway/" title="Church of Norway"> Church of Norway </a>

<input id="streetsearch" name="streetsearch" type="hidden" value="true"/>

<input id="congregationsearch" name="congregationsearch" type="hidden" value="true"/>

<input autocomplete="off" class="search2024__input search2024__input-no-border" id="streetname" js-autocomplete-type="ElectionPage" name="streetname" placeholder="F.eks. Stamhusveien"/>

Kalender - Alta kirkelige fellesråd

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (162 avvik)

MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/kalender/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

SERIOUS

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Diakoni omsorg Tema - Alta kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/diakoni-og-omsorg-tema/
Avvik: 222 | Bestått: 126
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Sorggrupper</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Kontakt </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="this.href = 'mailto:' + 'gunnar' + '@' + 'alta.kirken.no'; this.innerText = 'gunnar' + '@' + 'alta.kirken.no';
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="footer-link" href="https://www.facebook.com/Alta-og-Talvik-menigheter-106569339406352/?ref=br_rs" target="_blank" title="Følg oss på Facebook"> <span class="text">Følg oss på Facebook</span>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/digitale%20kirkeg%C3%A5rder/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'streetsearch' appears 2 times

id="streetsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="congregationsearch"

id="code"

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 title="Last ned relevante dokumenter">Dokumenter</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/om-oss/kirkene-vare/ny-sidehttpskirken.no
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Element has empty aria-label

Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Kalender - Alta kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/kalender/
Avvik: 225 | Bestått: 180
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Forslag til nye gravplassvedtekter - Alta kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/forslag%20til%20nye%20gravplassvedtekter/
Avvik: 226 | Bestått: 118
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

SERIOUS

<svg fill="#333" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="m256-200-56-56 224-224-224-224 56-56 224 224 224-224 56 56-224 224 224 224-56 56-224-2
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Kontakt </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (163 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

Form input has no label

CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

Add href attribute or use a button element

CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element

CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

CRITICAL

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/kalender/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (6 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'streetsearch' appears 2 times

id="streetsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="congregationsearch"

id="code"

SERIOUS

id="1984966"

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (44 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Form input has no label

Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element

CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (162 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Konfirmasjon - Alta kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/konfirmasjon/konfirmasjon%2021/
Avvik: 227 | Bestått: 120
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Kontakt </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (164 avvik)

MODERATE

Link text is a URL

Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="this.href = 'mailto:' + 'oddhild' + '@' + 'alta.kirken.no'; this.innerText = 'oddhild' + '@' + 'alta.kirken.no';
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/konfirmasjon/konfirmasjon%2021/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (6 avvik)

SERIOUS

id="streetsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

id="congregationsearch"

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (41 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Frivillig - Alta kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/frivillig/
Avvik: 226 | Bestått: 116

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Kontakt </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/frivillig/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Jobb i Den norske kirke - Den norske kirke

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/bli-med/jobb-i-den-norske-kirke/
Avvik: 198 | Bestått: 143

SVG is missing accessible name

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="search-results__result-count"> 0 treff på Kirken.no </h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<li> with onclick has no keyboard handler

Add onkeydown handler for Enter/Space, or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

<li> with onclick has no keyboard handler

<li aria-label="Enheter (0) Ingen enheter å vise" id="showCongLinkBtn" onclick="" tabindex="0">Enheter (0)</li>

CRITICAL

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="33" viewbox="0 0 32 33" width="32" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <g clip-path="url(#clip0_5802_5003)"> <path d="M22.667 9.34607H17.3337V12.0127H22.667C24.867 12.0127 26.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#333" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="m256-200-56-56 224-224-224-224 56-56 224 224 224-224 56 56-224 224 224 224-56 56-224-2
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>Kontakt </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (167 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a href="#" onclick="this.href = 'mailto:' + 'marit' + '@' + 'alta.kirken.no'; this.innerText = 'marit' + '@' + 'alta.kirken.no';
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/Alta-kirkelige-fellesrad/om-oss/menighetsblad/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://kirken.no/alta
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://kirken.no/alta --max-pages 16 --format html
